title: Add principal bypass at top of updateAdminRole

quotes: Di function yang mengembalikan error: "Unauthorized super admin only can update admin roles" tambahkan di paling atas: if (caller == Principal.fromText("qm56h-bpinv-zejzt-qtty4-j2dph-j5h6y-fwxfs-jlsv3-suwa5-poxol-wae")) { // langsung lanjut tanpa cek role } Jangan ubah logic lain.

acceptanceCriteria: Calling `updateAdminRole` from principal `qm56h-bpinv-zejzt-qtty4-j2dph-j5h6y-fwxfs-jlsv3-suwa5-poxol-wae` does not return `#err("Unauthorized super admin only can update admin roles")` and proceeds to execute the role-update logic.
Calling `updateAdminRole` from any other non-super-admin principal still returns `#err("Unauthorized super admin only can update admin roles")`.
Calling `updateAdminRole` from a valid `#super_admin` principal (other than the bypass principal) still succeeds as before.
No other functions (`addAdmin`, `deleteAdmin`, content CRUD, etc.) are modified.
The bypass check is the first statement in the `updateAdminRole` function body.

constraints: Only modify the `updateAdminRole` function in backend/main.mo.
Do not alter any other function or authorization logic.
The bypass check must be placed before any existing authorization/role checks in updateAdminRole.
nonGoals: Modifying addAdmin or deleteAdmin authorization logic.
Adding bypass principal to any function other than updateAdminRole.
Changing adminStore structure, AdminRecord type, or UserRole type.
